title: Optical Illusions at a Miami Museum

segments.title: Opening the program
segments.audioText: Welcome to the Voice of America's Newswords.
segments.transcript: Welcome to the Voice of America's Newswords.
segments.translationZh: 歡迎收聽美國之音嘅《News Words》。

points.label: Welcome to
points.explanationZh: 新聞或節目開場常用 Welcome to，後面接節目或地方名。

points.label: Voice of America's
points.explanationZh: 留意 America's 嘅 /z/ 音，後面連住 Newswords 聽。

points.label: Newswords
points.explanationZh: 節目名可以整組記，意思係新聞入面常見嘅字詞。

segments.title: Museum topic
segments.audioText: A museum in Miami, Florida specializes in works of art that stretch the imagination.
segments.transcript: A museum in Miami, Florida specializes in works of art that stretch the imagination.
segments.translationZh: 佛羅里達州邁阿密一間博物館專門展出啟發想像力嘅藝術作品。

points.label: A museum in Miami, Florida
points.explanationZh: 先聽地點：museum、Miami、Florida，幫你快速知道主題場景。

points.label: specializes in
points.explanationZh: specializes in 即係『專門做／專精於』，後面接範圍。

points.label: stretch the imagination
points.explanationZh: 字面係『拉闊想像』，即係令人覺得新奇、需要想像。

segments.title: Museum network
segments.audioText: The Miami Paradox Museum is one of several paradox museums across the world.
segments.transcript: The Miami Paradox Museum is one of several paradox museums across the world.
segments.translationZh: 邁阿密 Paradox Museum 係全球幾間 Paradox Museum 之一。

points.label: is one of several
points.explanationZh: one of several 表示『幾個之中其中一個』，聽新聞介紹機構時好常見。

points.label: paradox museums
points.explanationZh: paradox 係『矛盾、悖論』；作名稱時可以保留英文讀法。

points.label: across the world
points.explanationZh: across the world 即係『世界各地』，比 around the world 稍正式。

segments.title: Displays and photos
segments.audioText: More than 70 of its displays produce optical illusions worthy of a photograph.
segments.transcript: More than 70 of its displays produce optical illusions worthy of a photograph.
segments.translationZh: 館內超過七十個展品會製造值得拍照嘅視覺錯覺。

points.label: More than 70
points.explanationZh: 數字開頭要先抓住；more than 70 即係超過七十。

points.label: produce optical illusions
points.explanationZh: produce 呢度係『產生／製造』；optical illusions 係視覺錯覺。

points.label: worthy of a photograph
points.explanationZh: worthy of 表示『值得……』，即係值得影相留念。

segments.title: Meaning of illusion
segments.audioText: An illusion is anything that is false or not real, but that seems to be true or real.
segments.transcript: An illusion is anything that is false or not real, but that seems to be true or real.
segments.translationZh: illusion 係指任何假嘅或者唔真實、但似乎係真嘅東西。

points.label: An illusion is anything
points.explanationZh: 定義句常用 is anything / is something，聽到就準備記意思。

points.label: false or not real
points.explanationZh: false 同 not real 互相補充，意思都係『唔真』。

points.label: seems to be true or real
points.explanationZh: seems to be 表示『似乎係』，重點係表面同現實有差距。

sentences: Welcome to the Voice of America's Newswords.
A museum in Miami, Florida specializes in works of art that stretch the imagination.
The Miami Paradox Museum is one of several paradox museums across the world.
More than 70 of its displays produce optical illusions worthy of a photograph.
An illusion is anything that is false or not real, but that seems to be true or real.

vocabulary.example: The museum is popular with visitors.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢間博物館好受遊客歡迎。

vocabulary.example: The museum specializes in modern art.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢間博物館專門展出現代藝術。
呢件藝術品啟發想像力。

vocabulary.example: The museum uses paradoxes in its displays.
vocabulary.translationZh: 博物館喺展品入面運用矛盾概念。

vocabulary.example: The display is worthy of a photograph.
Optical illusions can trick your eyes.
vocabulary.translationZh: 視覺錯覺可以呃到你雙眼。

vocabulary.example: An illusion seems real, but it is not.
vocabulary.translationZh: illusion 似係真，但其實唔係。

phrases.example: A museum in Miami specializes in unusual art.
These works of art stretch the imagination.
The Miami museum is one of several across the world.
The display is worthy of a photograph.
An illusion seems to be true or real.

speakingPractice.prompt: 由 00:05 開始跟讀第二句，留意 specializes in 同 works of art 嘅連讀。
speakingPractice.example: A museum in Miami, Florida specializes in works of art that stretch the imagination.

speakingPractice.prompt: 重播 00:20，先寫低 More than 70、optical illusions、worthy of a photograph 三個重點。
speakingPractice.example: More than 70 of its displays produce optical illusions worthy of a photograph.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用 specializes in 改句，講一間你熟悉嘅店舖、公司或學校。
speakingPractice.example: This shop specializes in handmade gifts.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用兩句英文複述：呢間博物館有咩特色？illusion 係咩意思？
speakingPractice.example: The museum has displays that produce optical illusions. An illusion seems real, but it is not real.

notes: 先用時間點逐句重播，盲聽一次，再看稿核對 museum、illusion、real 等關鍵字。
第二句較長，可以拆成地點、動詞 specializes in、內容 works of art 三段嚟聽。
第四句重點係數字同名詞組：More than 70 / its displays / optical illusions。
跟讀時留意 seems to be 嘅弱讀，呢個片語可用嚟描述『看似如此』嘅情況。
